title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Cavendish X Limited
body: "Application number 5317  Applicant Cavendish Online Limited objected to the name used by Cavendish X Limited under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 19 September 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Cavendish X Limited is changed to 16049701, Ltd. "
